description_long: This is an empty, partially open pizza box made of brown corrugated cardboard, with a retro-styled printed lid featuring the words 'Hot Pizza' in bold red and white letters, radiating from a central pizza slice graphic. The box interior shows visible grease stains and remnants of pizza toppings, suggesting it recently contained a pizza. The lid is propped open, revealing the full design on the inside of the top flap, which matches the exterior branding. The box is rectangular with sharp, clean edges and a flat base, typical of standard pizza delivery packaging. The cardboard surface has a matte, slightly rough texture, and the print colors are slightly faded, giving a vintage appearance. There are no visible handles or additional features beyond the basic folding structure of the box.
description: A vintage-style, empty cardboard pizza box with a printed 'Hot Pizza' logo and visible grease stains inside. The box is partially open, showing its brown, matte surface and retro branding.
description_view_0: Side view of the pizza box with the lid partially open, showing the interior grease stains and the printed design on the lid.
description_view_1: Top-down view of the closed pizza box, highlighting the full 'Hot Pizza' logo and retro graphic on the lid.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of the box with the lid partially open, again revealing the stained interior and the printed lid design.
description_view_3: Front view of the open pizza box, clearly displaying the empty, stained interior and the inside of the printed lid.
